title: platystemon californicus var. crinitus
intro: Platystemon californicus var. crinitus, also known as the woolly mariposa lily, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Liliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the woolly mariposa lily include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the roots and flowers in water or oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
